services.name: AI Finances
services.tagline: Automated bookkeeping, invoicing and cash-flow forecasting — driven by your live project data.
services.description: Adelphos monitors your project accounts in real time, reconciles incoming invoices against purchase orders, and generates monthly management accounts without manual data entry. The agent flags anomalies before they become problems and produces cash-flow forecasts based on your programme milestones.

features.title: Automated Reconciliation
features.desc: Matches invoices to POs and flags discrepancies within minutes

features.title: Cash-flow Forecasting
features.desc: Rolling 12-month forecast tied to your programme milestones

features.title: Management Accounts
features.desc: Monthly packs generated from live data — no spreadsheet assembly

features.title: Anomaly Detection
features.desc: Agent surfaces duplicate invoices, unusual line items, and budget overruns

features.title: Audit Trail
features.desc: Every transaction logged with full provenance for compliance

services.title: AI Finances
services.headline_claim: Automated bookkeeping, invoicing and cash-flow forecasting — driven by your live project data.

services.name: AI Project Management
services.tagline: Programme tracking, risk registers and reporting — the agent keeps the project on rails.
services.description: The project-management agent reads your programme, tracks deliverables against milestones, maintains a live risk register and writes the weekly status report. It integrates with your existing PM tools and pushes updates to stakeholders automatically.

features.title: Programme Tracking
features.desc: Live Gantt sync — flags slippage the day it happens, not at the next review

features.title: Risk Register
features.desc: Agent-maintained register with auto-scored likelihood and impact

features.title: Status Reporting
features.desc: Weekly and monthly reports drafted from live data — ready for sign-off

features.title: Stakeholder Updates
features.desc: Targeted email summaries pushed to each stakeholder group

features.title: Deliverable Tracker
features.desc: Maps every deliverable to its programme milestone and owner

services.title: AI Project Management
services.headline_claim: Programme tracking, risk registers and reporting — the agent keeps the project on rails.

services.name: AI Document Controller
services.tagline: Transmittals, registers, revision tracking — the agent runs your document control.
services.description: The document-controller agent manages your transmittal register, tracks revisions, chases outstanding approvals and generates cover sheets. It reads incoming transmittals, logs them against the register and notifies the responsible engineer — all without manual filing.

features.title: Transmittal Processing
features.desc: Reads incoming transmittals and logs them to the register automatically

features.title: Revision Tracking
features.desc: Tracks every revision with full history and approval status

features.title: Approval Chasing
features.desc: Agent sends reminders for outstanding approvals on a configurable schedule

features.title: Cover Sheet Generation
features.desc: Produces transmittal cover sheets from templates — no manual assembly

features.title: Register Dashboard
features.desc: Live view of all documents, statuses and overdue items

services.title: AI Document Controller
services.headline_claim: Transmittals, registers, revision tracking — the agent runs your document control.

services.name: Specification Writer
services.tagline: Forward a brief, receive a complete MEP specification section.
services.description: Email your project brief and scope to the specification address. The agent reads it, selects the relevant NBS clauses, fills in the project-specific variables and returns a formatted specification section — ready for review and insertion into your master document.

features.title: NBS Clause Selection
features.desc: Agent selects clauses from the NBS library based on your brief

features.title: Project Variables
features.desc: Fills in project-specific values — flow rates, pressures, equipment refs

features.title: Formatted Output
features.desc: Returns a Word document matching your house style

features.title: Revision Handling
features.desc: Reply to the email thread with amendments — agent updates the spec

services.title: Specification Writer
services.headline_claim: Forward a brief, receive a complete MEP specification section.

services.name: Revit Modelling Agent
services.tagline: Email a markup, receive the Revit model update.
services.description: Send a marked-up PDF or a written instruction to the modelling address. The agent interprets the request, executes the changes in Revit and returns the updated model file with a change summary. Works for routing, equipment placement, annotation and parameter edits.

features.title: Markup Interpretation
features.desc: Reads annotated PDFs and translates them into Revit operations

features.title: Model Execution
features.desc: Runs the changes in a headless Revit session and returns the updated RVT

features.title: Change Summary
features.desc: Detailed log of what was changed, added or removed

features.title: QA Check
features.desc: Runs the QA manager against the updated model before returning it

services.title: Revit Modelling Agent
services.headline_claim: Email a markup, receive the Revit model update.

services.name: COBie Generator
services.tagline: Forward the model, receive a validated COBie deliverable.
services.description: Send your Revit model to the COBie address. The agent extracts asset data, validates it against the COBie schema, highlights any gaps and returns a completed COBie spreadsheet with a validation report. Handles COBie UK 2012, COBie 2.4 and IFC-COBie mapping.

features.title: Asset Extraction
features.desc: Pulls asset data from the Revit model — types, instances, spaces, zones

features.title: Schema Validation
features.desc: Checks every field against the target COBie schema version

features.title: Gap Analysis
features.desc: Highlights missing or incomplete data with remediation suggestions

features.title: Multi-format Export
features.desc: Returns COBie as Excel, IFC or JSON — your choice

services.title: COBie Generator
services.headline_claim: Forward the model, receive a validated COBie deliverable.

services.name: Schematic Designer
services.tagline: Describe the system, receive a production-ready schematic.
services.description: Email a system description or a design brief to the schematics address. The agent produces a fully annotated MEP schematic diagram — piping schematics, duct layouts, electrical single-line diagrams or control wiring. Returns a DWG and PDF with a design narrative.

features.title: System Interpretation
features.desc: Reads a brief and determines the appropriate schematic type

features.title: Annotated Output
features.desc: Full annotations — flow directions, sizes, equipment tags, valve schedules

features.title: DWG + PDF
features.desc: Returns both formats for CAD integration and review distribution

features.title: Design Narrative
features.desc: Accompanying text explaining design decisions and assumptions

services.title: Schematic Designer
services.headline_claim: Describe the system, receive a production-ready schematic.
